overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a science fiction video game (Starfield) showing a character in a futuristic coat exploring a high-tech facility interior. The character navigates a control room with holographic displays, passes a seated technician, briefly accompanies an armored security officer through a storage corridor, and exits through a doorway to an exterior area.

scene_state.functional_zone: high-tech command center with monitoring stations

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the control room toward the central console station

notable_agents.action: technician seated at the central console, working on the holographic interface

entered.detail: large curved wall covered with multiple holographic data displays showing ship schematics
array of glowing blue and orange data screens with technical readouts
circular workstation with illuminated interface panels and a swivel chair
open doorway revealing a lounge area with plants and seating

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a futuristic control room dominated by a massive wall of holographic displays. A technician works at a central circular console while the camera approaches, with a glimpse of a lounge area visible through a doorway to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition area between command center and storage corridor

events.description: character turns right to navigate around the console toward the corridor
moving from the open control room into the narrower auxiliary corridor

agents.ego_description: navigating past the console operator and turning toward the corridor exit

notable_agents.action: technician remains seated at the console, continuing to work as the character passes by

entered.detail: white geometric room divider with metal frame separating the areas
large cylindrical support column with dark paneling

segments.scene_description: The character turns right past the console operator, moving away from the main control wall. A geometric office partition comes into view on the right as the character enters a transitional space with a structural column, heading toward a corridor entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: personnel storage corridor with equipment lockers

events.description: armored security officer joins the character and walks alongside

agents.ego_description: proceeding through the storage corridor accompanied by a security officer

notable_agents.action: armored security officer walking in step with the character through the corridor

entered.detail: tall gray personnel lockers for equipment storage lining the wall
stacked cargo containers and supply boxes

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow corridor lined with metal lockers and storage crates. An armored security officer joins and walks alongside, passing a fire extinguisher mounted on the wall as they move toward the facility exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: facility exit doorway transitioning to exterior

events.description: character approaches the automatic exit door leading outside
transition from artificial interior lighting to natural exterior daylight

agents.ego_description: approaching the exit doorway and stepping through to the exterior area

entered.detail: automatic sliding door frame leading to the outside
large containers with green foliage visible in the exterior courtyard

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the facility exit, where bright daylight becomes visible through the doorway. Passing through the automatic door, the scene transitions from the dim interior to a sunlit exterior courtyard with planters and greenery.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the dim, high-tech interior of a control center out into a bright, sunlit courtyard. It begins by following a character through a futuristic control room dominated by a massive wall of holographic displays and a technician at a circular console. As the character turns right, the scene shifts away from the main displays and past a geometric office partition toward a transitional space marked by a structural column. The camera then moves into a narrow storage corridor lined with metal lockers and crates, where an armored security officer joins the character as they pass a wall-mounted fire extinguisher. Finally, the dim interior lighting gives way to brilliant daylight as the character passes through an automatic door into an exterior courtyard filled with greenery and planters.
